title: Deer Flow Unveiled
description: 🤖 Революционный ИИ-агент: bytedance/deer-flow - это открытая платформа, которая позволяет создавать супер-агентов, способных решать задачи разного уровня сложности, от простых до тех, которые требуют часов работы. Это ва
body_en:
Bytedance's Deer Flow is an open-source, long-horizon SuperAgent harness that has been making waves in the AI research community. This innovative framework is designed to handle complex tasks that require extended periods of time, ranging from minutes to hours, with ease and efficiency. What makes Deer Flow particularly noteworthy is its ability to elegantly solve a real pain point in the field of AI, making it a genuinely novel and impactful solution.

At its core, Deer Flow leverages a combination of sandboxes, memories, tools, skills, subagents, and a message gateway to tackle tasks of varying complexity. The use of sandboxes allows for safe and isolated experimentation, while memories enable the agent to learn from past experiences and adapt to new situations. The integration of tools and skills provides the agent with a versatile set of capabilities, which can be further augmented by subagents that specialize in specific tasks. The message gateway facilitates seamless communication between these components, ensuring that the agent can operate efficiently and effectively.

One of the key features that sets Deer Flow apart is its ability to handle long-horizon tasks, which are often a challenge for traditional AI agents. By using a combination of planning and reinforcement learning, Deer Flow can navigate complex environments and make decisions that require extended periods of time. This is particularly useful in applications such as robotics, where tasks may require hours or even days to complete. Additionally, Deer Flow's modular design makes it highly customizable, allowing researchers and developers to tailor the agent to their specific needs.

ML engineers and researchers working on complex, long-horizon tasks should take notice of Deer Flow, as it has the potential to significantly improve the efficiency and effectiveness of their work. Practical use cases for Deer Flow include robotics, autonomous systems, and other applications that require extended periods of time to complete tasks. With its unique combination of features and capabilities, Deer Flow is an exciting development in the field of AI, and its potential impact should not be overlooked. As the AI research community continues to evolve, Deer Flow is likely to play an increasingly important role in shaping the future of long-horizon task handling.

title: AI System Prompts Leak
description: 🤖 Секретные подсказки ИИ раскрыты. Ты когда-нибудь задумывался, как работают самые передовые модели ИИ, такие как ChatGPT или Claude? Теперь у нас есть ответ: в открытом доступе появились системные подсказки от лидеров И
body_en:
Extracted system prompts from major AI models have been made available, providing valuable insights into the inner workings of these complex systems. This leak matters now because it sheds light on the proprietary technology used by companies like Anthropic and OpenAI, allowing developers to better understand how these models are trained and fine-tuned. The extracted prompts come from a range of models, including Anthropic's Claude Fable 5, Opus 4.8, and Claude Code, as well as OpenAI's ChatGPT 5.5 Thinking and GPT 5.5 Instant.

One of the key features of this leak is the sheer breadth of models represented. In addition to Anthropic and OpenAI, the leak includes prompts from Google's Gemini 3.5 Flash and 3.1 Pro, as well as xAI's Grok, Cursor, and Copilot. This diversity of models provides a unique opportunity for developers to compare and contrast the approaches used by different companies. Furthermore, the leak includes prompts from a range of applications, including code generation, text summarization, and conversation modeling.

What makes this leak truly unique is the level of detail provided. The extracted prompts are often highly specific, revealing the exact language and formatting used to train these models. This level of granularity allows developers to reverse-engineer the training processes used by these companies, potentially leading to new insights and innovations. For example, developers can use this information to fine-tune their own models, or to develop new applications that leverage the strengths of these proprietary systems.

ML engineers and developers working with AI models should care about this leak, as it provides a rare glimpse into the proprietary technology used by industry leaders. Practical use cases for this information include fine-tuning existing models, developing new applications, and improving the overall performance of AI systems. As the field of AI continues to evolve, access to this kind of information will become increasingly important for developers looking to stay ahead of the curve. In conclusion, the leak of AI system prompts is a significant development that has the potential to drive innovation and improvement in the field of AI.

title: AI Coding Agents
description: Сейчас самое время поговорить об Agent Skills, производственных инженерных навыках для кодирования агентов ИИ. Это важно прямо сейчас, потому что такие навыки открывают новые возможности для автоматизации и оптимизации п
body_en:
Production-grade engineering skills for AI coding agents have become a crucial aspect of the software development landscape. As AI technology continues to advance, the need for reliable and efficient coding agents has increased significantly. The addyosmani/agent-skills project aims to provide a comprehensive set of skills for AI coding agents, enabling them to operate at a production-grade level. This matters now more than ever, as companies are increasingly relying on AI-powered tools to streamline their development processes and improve overall productivity.

One of the key features of the addyosmani/agent-skills project is its focus on modularity and flexibility. The project provides a wide range of skills that can be easily integrated into existing AI coding agents, allowing developers to customize and extend their capabilities as needed. This modular approach enables developers to create tailored solutions that meet the specific requirements of their projects, making it an attractive option for companies with unique development needs.

Another unique aspect of the addyosmani/agent-skills project is its emphasis on testing and validation. The project provides a comprehensive testing framework that ensures the skills developed for AI coding agents are thoroughly tested and validated, guaranteeing a high level of reliability and performance. This focus on testing and validation is critical in production-grade environments, where downtime and errors can have significant consequences.

ML engineers and companies invested in AI-powered development tools should care about the addyosmani/agent-skills project. Practical use cases include automating repetitive coding tasks, improving code quality and consistency, and enhancing collaboration between human developers and AI coding agents. By leveraging the skills provided by the addyosmani/agent-skills project, companies can unlock new levels of efficiency and productivity in their software development processes.

In conclusion, the addyosmani/agent-skills project represents a significant step forward in the development of production-grade engineering skills for AI coding agents. As the demand for reliable and efficient AI-powered development tools continues to grow, the importance of this project will only continue to increase. By providing a comprehensive set of skills and a focus on modularity, testing, and validation, the addyosmani/agent-skills project is poised to play a critical role in shaping the future of software development.
